hints.text: All Gen3, **white car no antenna** (also ZA/BW/Eswatini); BW & Eswatini only have Gen3, South Africa also has Gen2/Gen4
Characteristic **'Lesotho mountains'**: bare & treeless, **tabletop shapes**, recognizable horizontal rocky ridgelines
Plates **long white w/ blue text** (Mokorotlo hat symbol on the left)
Road lines **yellow outer / white inner**; unique **triple middle lines** (2 solid + dashed between — only in the 5 Southern African countries)
Drives **left**; traditional **round thatched huts** common in rural areas
**Agave** plants common; grasslands are **short grass** (Eswatini famously has tall grass)
Traditional clothing — many people wear a **Basotho woollen blanket**; lots of free-roaming **livestock** on roads
Coverage sparse (all urban coverage in the NW); **flat** region (tabletops far off) vs **mountainous** (road hugs the mountainside; only ~6 main roads covered)
